prompt: I'm building a todo app. I need a list where users can drag items to reorder them, swipe individual items to delete them (with a nice exit animation), and add new items (which should slide in). The list uses a { id: string, text: string, done: boolean } shape. Also I want a drag handle on the left side of each item — the whole item shouldn't be draggable, only the handle. Write me the TodoList component. React 19, TypeScript.
assertions: Uses Reorder.Group with values and onReorder props
Uses Reorder.Item with key={item.id} and value={item}
Uses useDragControls() and dragListener={false} to restrict drag to a handle
Wraps items in AnimatePresence for enter/exit animations
Items have initial/animate/exit for smooth add/remove
For swipe-to-delete, uses drag='x' or onDragEnd with an offset threshold to remove item
Does not use any Motion+ components
